title: Excessive memory usage in code node with buffer
symptom: After connecting a code node that processes a buffer, Chrome's memory usage spikes to 4,000,000K.
applies_when: Using getBinaryDataBuffer() in a code node
not_this_if: Buffer is not logged or processed in a different way
root_cause: The getBinaryDataBuffer() function loads the entire file into memory. If the buffer is logged directly, it can lead to excessive memory consumption, especially with large files.
fix_steps: Modify the code to log the buffer size instead of the buffer itself
Ensure that the code returns items, not the buffer
agent_instruction: Change the logging to display the buffer size and return items in the code node.
